text:
Created attachment 244243
crashinfo analyzation

The working kernel I'm using:
# uname -aKU
FreeBSD freebsd 14.0-ALPHA2 FreeBSD 14.0-ALPHA2 amd64 1400094 #0 main-n264875-64e881f2db96: Fri Aug 18 17:58:43 PDT 2023     root@freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400094 1400094

The src commit I'm on for the problematic kernel build:
# git log -n1 --oneline 
89e17c6ea03f (HEAD -> main, origin/main, origin/HEAD) libc/gen/_pthread_stubs.c: Remove stray whitespaces
